notes: Tier age is calculated from the durable voucher row creation time.
Do not use image push time, provider exit time, restore request time, or local time.

tiers.name: hot_acr_ee
tiers.purpose: Fast registry lookup for recent voucher-backed images
tiers.m3_9_owner: Configure live ACR EE retention and registry lookup

tiers.name: warm_s3_standard_ia
tiers.storage_class: S3 Standard-IA or equivalent warm object storage
tiers.purpose: Lower-cost warm copy before cold archive transition
tiers.m3_9_owner: Configure lifecycle transition and verified restore staging

tiers.name: cold_s3_glacier
tiers.storage_class: S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval or equivalent
tiers.purpose: Five-year archival retention for voucher-backed image restore
tiers.m3_9_owner: Configure cold archive, restore requests, and drill evidence

kms_backup_requirements.m3_9_owner: Automate encrypted KMS key backup and restore verification

non_goals: No S3 or Glacier API calls
